metadata.title: Sanat Vats Profile Portal Dataset v1
metadata.purpose: Structured content backbone for professional profile portal, recruiter chatbot, knowledge graph, and resume variants.
metadata.generated_from: User-provided project descriptions in ChatGPT conversation
metadata.notes: Review for confidentiality, factual precision, and resume-safe wording before publication.

projects.Project Name: Intelligent BOM & Planning Master Data Transformation
projects.Business Problem: GPU and networking BOM creation was semi-manual, fragile, and frequently impacted by design changes, consigned vs turnkey parts, yield logic, SKU/LIFNR complexity, and plant extension gaps.
projects.Solution Summary: Designed end-to-end BOM and planning master data architecture across EBOM, Reference BOM, Planning BOM, Sales BOM, NPI BOM, material master, plant extension, yield calculation, validation, and Production Version flow.
projects.Technologies / Platforms: SAP ECC; SAP S/4HANA; PLM; SAP BOM; Material Master; Python; Databricks; React; Streamlit; NetworkX
projects.Capabilities: SAP/S4 transformation; BOM architecture; AI-ready data foundation; supply chain data design; graph visualization; master data validation
projects.Stakeholders: Supply Chain; Planning; Manufacturing; IT; PLM; NPI plants; CEM teams
projects.Outcomes / Value: Faster and more accurate BOM/planning data creation; reduced manual effort; improved Production Version and PO readiness; stronger data quality
projects.Target Role Alignment: Enterprise Data & AI Leader; PPMD; CDO; SAP/MDM Leader
projects.5-Line Portal Summary: Designed intelligent BOM and planning master data architecture within a major ECC-to-S/4HANA transformation. Addressed semi-manual and fragile EBOM, Reference BOM, Planning BOM, NPI BOM, Sales BOM, SKU/LIFNR, plant extension, yield, and consigned/turnkey part processes. Used Python, Databricks, React/Streamlit prototypes, and NetworkX to analyze and visualize BOM relationships, SAP logic, and ABAP/BAPI process flows. Supported supply chain, planning, manufacturing, IT, PLM, CEM, and NPI stakeholders. Helped improve BOM quality, planning readiness, Production Version flow, and downstream PO/costing processes.
projects.Tags: SAP S/4HANA; BOM; EBOM; RBOM; PBOM; NPI; Material Master; Production Version; Python; Databricks; NetworkX; React; AI-ready Data; Supply Chain
projects.Chatbot Keywords: NVIDIA; BOM; SAP; S/4HANA; EBOM; Planning BOM; Reference BOM; Production Version; consigned; turnkey; yield; SKU LIFNR; Python; NetworkX; Databricks; supply chain

projects.Project Name: AI Financial Intelligence & Agentic Automation Platform
projects.Your Role: Founder / Product Architect / Full-Stack AI Builder
projects.Business Problem: Investment, portfolio, market, SEC, options/futures, P&L, broker, tax, and sentiment data were fragmented across many systems and manual workflows.
projects.Solution Summary: Built a React-based AI financial intelligence platform integrating broker data, market data, SEC filings, financial statements, futures trend ML, portfolio P&L, LLM summarization, and agentic browser automation.
projects.Technologies / Platforms: React; Python; PostgreSQL; SQLite; IBKR; yFinance; SEC EDGAR; OpenAI; Gemini; XGBoost; Random Forest; Playwright; OpenClaw
projects.Capabilities: GenAI; Agentic AI; ML; LLM summarization; financial analytics; portfolio intelligence; broker automation; tax workflow automation
projects.Outcomes / Value: Demonstrates hands-on AI/ML/full-stack product-building capability; supports investment decision intelligence and automation
projects.Target Role Alignment: AI Leader; AI Product Builder; FP&A AI Leader; Data/Cloud Leader
projects.5-Line Portal Summary: Built a React-based AI financial intelligence and agentic automation platform. Integrated broker data, market data, SEC filings, financial statements, portfolio P&L, options/futures analytics, news, sentiment, and tax workflow automation. Used OpenAI and Gemini for summarization and interpretation, and XGBoost/Random Forest for futures trend analysis on live data. Used Playwright/OpenClaw for broker statement download and AI-assisted browser automation. Demonstrates hands-on GenAI, ML, full-stack, finance, and agentic AI capability.
projects.Tags: GenAI; Agentic AI; React; Python; OpenAI; Gemini; XGBoost; Random Forest; IBKR; yFinance; SEC EDGAR; PostgreSQL; SQLite; Playwright; OpenClaw; Portfolio Analytics
projects.Chatbot Keywords: Artha; AI finance app; broker data; IBKR; SEC; 10-K; 10-Q; futures; options; P&L; OpenAI; Gemini; XGBoost; Random Forest; Playwright; OpenClaw; tax automation

projects.Project Name: Finance Data Foundation, MDM Architecture & Persona-Based Reporting
projects.Your Role: Finance Data Strategy / MDM Architecture / Data Governance Lead
projects.Business Problem: Finance reporting needed stronger data foundations, persona-based KPI design, data dictionary, governance, hierarchy, and relationship structures across planning and consolidation.
projects.Solution Summary: Designed MDM architecture, finance data governance operating model, CR/workflow process, persona-based reporting for top finance roles, KPI/metric definitions, facts/dimensions, rules, calculations, and data dictionary.
projects.Technologies / Platforms: Azure; Data Lake; OneStream; Data Dictionary; MDM; Data Governance; Finance Data Model
projects.Capabilities: CFO reporting; MDM architecture; data governance; persona reporting; KPI design; data dictionary; AI-ready finance data
projects.Stakeholders: CFO; BU CFO; FP&A; Controller; Finance; Data Governance; IT
projects.Outcomes / Value: Created trusted finance data foundation for planning, consolidation, reporting, and future AI-enabled CFO analytics
projects.Target Role Alignment: Enterprise Data & AI Leader; FP&A Systems Leader; CDO; PPMD
projects.5-Line Portal Summary: Supported finance data management and reporting modernization for Mars. Designed MDM architecture, finance data governance operating model, CR/workflow processes, data dictionary, relationships, attributes, and data quality rules. Defined persona-based reporting for top finance roles, including KPIs, metrics, facts, dimensions, calculation rules, and report packages. Designed architecture between data lake planning data and OneStream consolidation. Built foundations for trusted CFO reporting and future AI-enabled finance analytics.
projects.Tags: Finance Data; MDM; Data Governance; CFO Reporting; Persona Reporting; OneStream; Azure; Data Dictionary; Data Quality; KPI Design; Data Lake
projects.Chatbot Keywords: Mars; finance reporting; persona; CFO; BU CFO; KPI; metrics; OneStream; data lake; MDM; governance; data dictionary; data quality; hierarchy

projects.Your Role: AI Finance Product Lead / Solution Architect / Demo Builder
projects.Business Problem: FP&A teams spend significant manual effort on driver-based analysis, scenario planning, variance explanations, and management commentary from EPM data.
projects.Solution Summary: Built demo product using AI agents on top of EPM data for driver-based analysis, scenario planning, variance analysis, management commentary, and natural-language finance Q&A.
projects.Technologies / Platforms: EPM data; GenAI; LLMs; Agentic AI; AI Commentary; Finance Q&A
projects.Capabilities: AI-enabled FP&A; agentic workflows; variance analysis; scenario planning; management commentary; CFO analytics
projects.Stakeholders: Finance; FP&A; CFO office; internal practice; client demo audiences
projects.Outcomes / Value: Demonstrated future-state AI-enabled FP&A and reduction of manual analysis/commentary effort
projects.Target Role Alignment: AI Leader; FP&A AI Leader; PPMD; Product Builder
projects.5-Line Portal Summary: Built an AI-enabled FP&A demo product on top of EPM data. The product supports driver-based analysis, scenario planning, variance analysis, management commentary, and natural-language finance Q&A. Designed agentic workflows with specialized agents for data retrieval, driver analysis, scenario modeling, variance explanation, and commentary generation. Demonstrates how GenAI can modernize FP&A and reduce manual finance analysis. Serves as a reusable market-facing AI finance accelerator.
projects.Tags: AI FP&A; GenAI; Agentic AI; EPM; Driver-Based Planning; Scenario Planning; Variance Analysis; Management Commentary; Finance Q&A
projects.Chatbot Keywords: EY AI Finance; FP&A AI; EPM; driver-based; scenario planning; variance analysis; commentary; management reporting; agents; CFO Q&A

projects.Project Name: S/4 CFIN, MDM, EPM & Finance Data Harmonization
projects.Your Role: Finance Data Transformation Lead / MDM Solution Architect
projects.Business Problem: Finance data was spread across 20+ ERPs with inconsistent CoA, cost center, profit center, functional area, vehicle, account, architecture, and channel structures.
projects.Solution Summary: Supported multi-year finance transformation harmonizing ERP data into S/4 Central Finance, rationalizing CoA and finance dimensions, and integrating actuals, planning, forecasting, and consolidation.
projects.Technologies / Platforms: SAP S/4 CFIN; Oracle DRM; EDMCS; EPM; Planning Systems; Consolidation Systems
projects.Capabilities: Finance data harmonization; CFIN; MDM; CoA rationalization; ERP mapping; planning/consolidation integration
projects.Stakeholders: CFO/Finance; IT; ERP teams; Planning; Consolidation; Data Governance
projects.Outcomes / Value: Improved consistency between actuals, planning, forecasting, consolidation, and reporting; reduced reconciliation complexity
projects.Target Role Alignment: PPMD; FP&A Systems Leader; CDO; Enterprise Data Leader
projects.5-Line Portal Summary: Supported a multi-year finance transformation harmonizing data from 20+ ERPs into S/4 Central Finance and connected planning/consolidation platforms. Rationalized Chart of Accounts, cost center, profit center, functional area, vehicle, account, architecture, and channel dimensions using Oracle DRM. Designed master data standards, mapping logic, hierarchy governance, and ERP-to-CFIN integration. Supported CAPEX planning, sales forecasting, long-term planning, actuals, and consolidation alignment. Built trusted finance data foundations for CFO reporting and future AI-enabled FP&A.
projects.Tags: SAP CFIN; MDM; Oracle DRM; Finance Data Harmonization; CoA Rationalization; EPM; Planning; Consolidation; ERP Mapping
projects.Chatbot Keywords: GM; CFIN; S/4; 20 ERPs; CoA; cost center; profit center; functional area; vehicle; account; Oracle DRM; planning; consolidation

projects.Project Name: Global FP&A, M&A Finance Integration & EPM Transformation
projects.Your Role: Finance Transformation Lead / EPM Solution Architect
projects.Business Problem: Major M&A, restructuring, and spin-off activity required standardized global planning, forecasting, reporting, variance, and close processes.
projects.Solution Summary: Defined P&L forecasting methodology from board revenue direction to strategic finance plan, long-range plan, AOP, monthly forecast, variance analysis, management reporting, and EPM implementation.
projects.Technologies / Platforms: Oracle Hyperion; OFA; EPM; Planning; Close; Forecasting; Reporting
projects.Capabilities: FP&A transformation; M&A finance integration; EPM; variance analysis; FX; constant currency; price-volume-mix; EBITDA; cash flow
projects.Stakeholders: CFO/Finance; FP&A; Controllers; Business Units; Global Finance
projects.Outcomes / Value: Supported global planning/reporting standardization, M&A integration, spin-off readiness, variance analytics, and finance decision support
projects.Target Role Alignment: FP&A Systems Leader; PPMD; Enterprise Data Leader
projects.5-Line Portal Summary: Led finance systems and EPM work across major M&A, restructuring, and spin-off events. Defined global FP&A forecasting methodology across P&L lines, connecting board-level revenue direction to strategic finance plan, long-range plan, AOP, monthly forecast, variance analysis, and management reporting. Supported FX translation, constant currency, intercompany eliminations, allocations, price-volume-mix, EBITDA, cash flow, and KPI calculations. Worked across Oracle Hyperion and OFA-based finance systems. Demonstrates deep CFO systems, FP&A, and transformation expertise.
projects.Tags: FP&A; EPM; M&A; Oracle Hyperion; OFA; AOP; Forecasting; Variance Analysis; FX; Constant Currency; EBITDA; Cash Flow; Price Volume Mix
projects.Chatbot Keywords: Kraft; Mondelez; Cadbury; Danone; Hyperion; OFA; FP&A; AOP; long range plan; forecast; variance; FX; constant currency; EBITDA; PVM

projects.Project Name: Revenue Recognition Data Transformation & ASC 606 Compliance Solution
projects.Your Role: Finance Data / Revenue Recognition Solution Lead
projects.Business Problem: Revenue recognition needed to move from header-level to line-level treatment, with recognition based on product sale, service delivery, or fulfillment logic.
projects.Solution Summary: Designed custom data solution integrating PeopleSoft, Salesforce, Zuora, and SQL Server to support line-level revenue identification, ASC 606-style compliance, and finance traceability.
projects.Technologies / Platforms: PeopleSoft; Salesforce; Zuora; SQL Server; Custom Data Model
projects.Capabilities: Revenue recognition; ASC 606; finance compliance; SQL solution; CRM/ERP/billing integration
projects.Stakeholders: Finance; Accounting; Compliance; IT; Revenue Operations
projects.Outcomes / Value: Improved revenue recognition traceability, compliance support, and line-level finance reporting logic
projects.5-Line Portal Summary: Designed a custom revenue recognition data solution to support ASC 606-style compliance. Moved revenue recognition logic toward line-level identification rather than header-level treatment. Integrated PeopleSoft, Salesforce, Zuora, and SQL Server to connect contracts, products, services, billing, and recognition events. Supported recognition based on product sale, service delivery, or fulfillment logic. Improved finance traceability, compliance support, and revenue reporting control.
projects.Tags: Revenue Recognition; ASC 606; SQL Server; PeopleSoft; Salesforce; Zuora; Compliance; Finance Data; Line-Level Revenue
projects.Chatbot Keywords: Moody’s; revenue recognition; ASC 606; line level; PeopleSoft; Salesforce; Zuora; SQL Server; contract; billing; service delivery

projects.Project Name: Finance Reporting, Planning Modernization & MDM Architecture
projects.Business Problem: Executive/QBR reporting and planning were highly manual, Excel-driven, and inconsistent across BUs/segments, with systems mainly used for BPC uploads.
projects.Solution Summary: Designed GCP-based finance reporting architecture and master data solutioning across SAP, Anaplan, BPC, Collibra, material master, BOM, and finance reporting processes.
projects.Technologies / Platforms: GCP; SAP; Anaplan; BPC; Collibra; Palantir exposure; MDM; Reporting Analytics
projects.Capabilities: Finance reporting modernization; cloud architecture; MDM; data governance; QBR reporting; planning analytics
projects.Stakeholders: Finance; Executive Reporting; BU Finance; IT; Data Governance
projects.Outcomes / Value: Streamlined financial planning/reporting, improved trust in data, supported standardization across segments and BUs
projects.Target Role Alignment: Enterprise Data & AI Leader; FP&A Systems Leader; PPMD; CDO
projects.5-Line Portal Summary: Served as Data and Reporting Lead for finance transformation at Tyson Foods. Designed GCP-based reporting architecture and master data solutioning across SAP, Anaplan, BPC, Collibra, material master, BOM, and finance reporting processes. Addressed manual Excel-heavy planning and reporting processes across BUs and segments. Supported executive reporting, QBR, finance analytics, and planning modernization. Helped build trusted data foundations and standardization across business units.
